variant: Turf equipment accessory pack for two-post lifts

features: Converts standard two-post lifts for turf equipment service
Lifting forks and trough system for turf vehicles
Accommodates various turf maintenance vehicle types
Works with Mohawk LMF-12, TP-16, TP-18 and similar two-post lifts

optional_equipment.description: Upgraded dual trough version available separately

safety_features: Trough system captures rear wheels securely
Must be used with compatible Mohawk two-post lift
